name: @tank/security-review
description: Security best practices review for web applications with language-specific guidance. Covers OWASP Top 10, input validation, authentication (JWT, session, OAuth), authorization (RBAC, ABAC), XSS prevention, CSRF protection, SQL injection, secrets management, dependency auditing, and secure headers. Includes framework-specific references for JavaScript/TypeScript, Python, and Node.js backends. Synthesized from OWASP guidelines, CWE database, and production security patterns. Triggers: security, vulnerability, XSS, CSRF, SQL injection, authentication, authorization, OWASP, input validation, sanitization, encryption, secrets, JWT, session, CORS, CSP, security headers, dependency audit, security review, penetration testing.
